display-name.lang: United Kingdom of Great Britain and Northern Ireland
United Kingdom of Great Britain and Northern Ireland

United Kingdom of Great Britain and Northern Ireland

programme.title: MLB Plays of the Week
programme.desc: A look at the most exciting plays from the past week's matches.

programme.title: MLB Highlights
programme.desc: Action from Major League Baseball.

programme.title: Live MLB
programme.desc: Philadelphia Phillies v New York Mets (Start-time 6.35pm). Coverage of the National League match from Citizens Bank Park. These two sides last met in a three-match series in New York last month as the Phillies claimed a 2-1 series win. Philadelphia won the first game 2-1 before the Mets fought back with a 6-2 win, only for the Phillies to claim a thrilling 5-4 victory in the final match.

programme.title: Miracle of Istanbul
programme.desc: A look back at Liverpool's famous comeback in the 2005 Champions League final.

programme.title: UEFA Champions League - Classics
programme.desc: We rewind back to the 2006/07 UEFA Champions League final at the Olympic Stadium in Athens as AC Milan looked to avenge their defeat two years previously against the Reds.

programme.title: TNT Sports Reload
programme.desc: The best bits from TNT Sports over the last week, including exclusive interviews, top action, and more.

programme.title: MLB Highlights
programme.desc: Action from Major League Baseball.

programme.title: Live MLB
programme.desc: New York Yankees v Los Angeles Dodgers (Start-time 12.20am). Coverage of the inter-league match from Yankee Stadium. The two teams last met in a three-game series at the end of May and start of June last year as the Dodgers claimed a 2-1 series victory. The West Coast side won the first two matches 8-5 and 18-2 before the Yankees won the final game 7-3.

programme.title: MLB Classic
programme.desc: The 1992 Pirates were one out away from advancing to the World Series when Braves catcher Francisco Cabrera stepped to the plate with the bases loaded and two outs in the ninth.

programme.title: Tour de France Men Highlights
programme.desc: Action from the 15th stage of the Grand Tour race.

programme.title: Ultimate Pool
programme.desc: Action from the Group 5 matches in the Champions League tournament, as four players competed in a series of round-robin matches to earn a place in the Super 8's.

programme.title: Premier League Netbusters
programme.desc: The best action from the opening weekend of the 2025/26 season, including Aston Villa v Newcastle, and Manchester United v Arsenal.

programme.title: Premier League Netbusters
programme.desc: Action from matchday two of the 2025/26 season, including Newcastle United v Liverpool, Manchester City v Tottenham Hotspur, and West Ham United v Chelsea.

programme.title: Premier League Netbusters
programme.desc: Relive all the best goals and action from matchday three of the 2025/26 season, including Chelsea v Fulham, Leeds United v Newcastle United, and Liverpool v Arsenal.

programme.title: Premier League Netbusters
programme.desc: The best goals and action from matchday four of the 2025/26 season, featuring Arsenal v Nottingham Forest, West Ham United v and Manchester City v Manchester United.

programme.title: Premier League Netbusters
programme.desc: The best goals and action from matchday five of the 2025/26 season, including Liverpool v Everton, Manchester United v Chelsea and Arsenal v Manchester City.

programme.title: Premier League Netbusters
programme.desc: The best goals and action from matchday six of the 2025/26 season, including Brentford v Manchester United and Newcastle United v Arsenal.

programme.title: Premier League Netbusters
programme.desc: The best goals and action from matchday seven of the 2025/26 season, including Leeds United v Tottenham Hotspur, Arsenal v West Ham United, and Chelsea v Liverpool.

programme.title: Premier League Netbusters
programme.desc: The best goals and action from matchday eight of the 2025/26 season, including Nottingham Forest v Chelsea, Fulham v Arsenal, and Liverpool v Manchester United.

programme.title: Premier League Netbusters
programme.desc: The best goals and action from matchday nine of the 2025/26 season, including Arsenal v Crystal Palace, Aston Villa v Manchester City, and Everton v Tottenham Hotspur.

programme.title: Premier League Netbusters
programme.desc: The best goals and action from matchday 10 of the 2025/26 season, including Liverpool v Aston Villa, Tottenham Hotspur v Chelsea, and Burnley v Arsenal.

programme.title: Premier League Netbusters
programme.desc: The best goals and action from matchday 11 of the 2025/26 season.

programme.title: Premier League Netbusters
programme.desc: The best goals and action from matchday 12 of the 2025/26 season, including Burnley v Chelsea, Newcastle United v Manchester City, and Arsenal v Tottenham Hotspur.

programme.title: Premier League Netbusters
programme.desc: The best goals and action from matchday 13 of the 2025/26 season, including Manchester City v Leeds United, West Ham United v Liverpool and Chelsea v Arsenal.

programme.title: Premier League Netbusters
programme.desc: The best goals and action from matchday 15 of the 2025/26 season, including Aston Villa v Arsenal, Manchester City v Sunderland, and Wolverhampton Wanderers v Manchester United.

programme.desc: The best goals and action from matchday 24 of the 2025/26 season, including Leeds United v Arsenal, Liverpool v Newcastle United, and Tottenham Hotspur v Manchester City.

programme.desc: The best goals and action from matchday 25 of the 2025/26 season, including Manchester United v Tottenham Hotspur, Arsenal v Sunderland, Wolverhampton Wanderers v Chelsea.

programme.title: Premier League Netbusters
programme.desc: The best goals and action from matchday 27 of the 2025/26 season, including Manchester City v Newcastle United, Nottingham Forest v Liverpool, and more.

programme.title: Premier League Netbusters
programme.desc: The best goals and action from matchday 28 of the 2025/26 season, including Bournemouth v Sunderland, Wolverhampton Wanderers v Aston Villa, and Arsenal v Chelsea.

programme.title: Premier League Netbusters
programme.desc: The best goals and action from matchday 29 of the 2025/26 season, including Brighton \u0026 Hove Albion v Arsenal, Manchester City v Nottingham Forest, and more.

programme.title: Premier League Netbusters
programme.desc: The best goals and action from matchday 30 of the 2025/26 season, including West Ham United v Manchester City, Arsenal v Everton, and Manchester United v Aston Villa.

programme.title: Premier League Netbusters
programme.desc: The best goals and action from matchday 31 of the 2025/26 season, including Brighton \u0026 Hove Albion v Liverpool, Everton v Chelsea, and Newcastle United v Sunderland.

programme.title: Premier League Netbusters
programme.desc: The best goals and action from matchday 32 of the 2025/26 season, including Arsenal v Bournemouth, Manchester United v Leeds United, and Chelsea v Manchester City.

programme.desc: The best goals and action from matchday 33 of the 2025/26 season, including Brentford v Fulham, Manchester City v Arsenal, and Chelsea v Manchester United.

programme.title: Premier League Netbusters
programme.desc: The best goals and action from matchday 38 of the 2025/26 season, which was the final round of games, and included West Ham United v Leeds United, and Tottenham Hotspur v Everton.

programme.title: Supercars Championship Highlights
programme.desc: Action from the first day of the 2026 NTI Townsville 500.

programme.title: Live: Athletes Unlimited Softball League
programme.desc: Coverage of softball action from the American professional league.

programme.title: Live: ESPN FC
programme.desc: Highlights, news, reactions and opinions from the day in soccer.

programme.title: 30 for 30
programme.desc: Award-winning director Dan Klores looks back on how, in 1995, one player managed to rub an entire city the wrong way.

programme.title: Live: NBA Summer League Basketball
programme.desc: Basketball action from the NBA Summer League.

programme.title: Live: WNBA Countdown
programme.desc: WNBA news, analysis, highlights and interviews.

programme.title: Live: WNBA Basketball
programme.desc: The Mercury battle the Sun at Mortgage Matchup Center for a WNBA game. Phoenix seek to snap a four-game skid behind Kahleah Copper who averages 20.5 points per game. Connecticut recently beat Portland, 90-87 behind 21 points from Aaliyah Edwards.

programme.title: Live: NBA Summer League Basketball
programme.desc: Basketball action from the NBA Summer League.

programme.title: Live: SportsCenter
programme.desc: The latest news, highlights and inside information from every corner of the sports world is presented each day on "SportsCenter," ESPN's first-ever program when the network debuted in September of 1979. The flagship series airs an evening edition and a brand new midnight show each weekday before the stage is cleared for a live "SportsCenter" morning block that emphasizes fast-paced, highlights-dri

programme.title: SportsCenter
programme.desc: The latest news, highlights and inside information from every corner of the sports world is presented each day on "SportsCenter," ESPN's first-ever program when the network debuted in September of 1979. The flagship series airs an evening edition and a brand new midnight show each weekday before the stage is cleared for a live "SportsCenter" morning block that emphasizes fast-paced, highlights-dri

programme.title: Live: SportsCenter
programme.desc: The latest news, highlights and inside information from every corner of the sports world is presented each day on "SportsCenter," ESPN's first-ever program when the network debuted in September of 1979. The flagship series airs an evening edition and a brand new midnight show each weekday before the stage is cleared for a live "SportsCenter" morning block that emphasizes fast-paced, highlights-dri

programme.title: Live: Get Up
programme.desc: ESPN's morning show features host Mike Greenberg with a rotating and diverse group of analysts opining about and analyzing the latest news from the world of sports. The two-hour, personality-driven show originates from Hudson Square in Lower Manhattan, a modern media hub for ESPN and The Walt Disney Company's New York-based teams. Greenberg, aka "Greeny," is formerly one-half of ESPN Radio's longt

programme.title: Live: First Take
programme.desc: Stephen A. Smith hosts this weekday morning sports debate show. Smith provides his expert takes on the day's trending sports topics and under-the-radar news. They're regularly joined by veteran analysts and the top guests in sports and entertainment.

programme.title: Live: The Pat McAfee Show
programme.desc: Former NFL punter Pat McAfee brings his humor and candor to the microphone to highlight the day's top stories.

programme.title: Live: SportsCenter
programme.desc: The latest news, highlights and inside information from every corner of the sports world is presented each day on "SportsCenter," ESPN's first-ever program when the network debuted in September of 1979. The flagship series airs an evening edition and a brand new midnight show each weekday before the stage is cleared for a live "SportsCenter" morning block that emphasizes fast-paced, highlights-dri

programme.title: Live: NBA Today
programme.desc: In-depth, comprehensive daily coverage of all aspects of the NBA from expert analysts.

programme.title: NFL Live
programme.desc: Host Laura Rutledge takes the helm of this weekday show featuring the likes of Marcus Spears, Dan Orlovsky, Mina Kimes, and Adam Schefter. The "NFL Live" crew entertains fans while offering all the latest news and analysis from across the NFL.

programme.title: Live: SportsCenter
programme.desc: The latest news, highlights and inside information from every corner of the sports world is presented each day on "SportsCenter," ESPN's first-ever program when the network debuted in September of 1979. The flagship series airs an evening edition and a brand new midnight show each weekday before the stage is cleared for a live "SportsCenter" morning block that emphasizes fast-paced, highlights-dri

programme.title: Live: Pardon the Interruption
programme.desc: The debate is the story in this fast-paced, half-hour series hosted by former Washington Post sportswriters Tony Kornheiser and Michael Wilbon. The pair engage in high-energy discussions, conduct interviews and often argue over topics not even related to sports. Other sports reporters appear as guests and offer opinions on the top stories of the day.

programme.title: Live: SportsCenter
programme.desc: The latest news, highlights and inside information from every corner of the sports world is presented each day on "SportsCenter," ESPN's first-ever program when the network debuted in September of 1979. The flagship series airs an evening edition and a brand new midnight show each weekday before the stage is cleared for a live "SportsCenter" morning block that emphasizes fast-paced, highlights-dri

programme.title: Live: MLB Baseball
programme.desc: The Dodgers travel to Citizens Bank Park to kick off a three-game series against the Phillies. The Dodgers lead the season series 2-1. Kyle Schwarber leads the Phillies in home runs while Shohei Ohtani leads the Dodgers in home runs.

programme.title: UEFA Champions League - Stories of the Finals
programme.desc: Relive the 2006 UEFA Champions League final as Barcelona met Arsenal in Paris. Two late Barca goals sunk the Gunners in a game that ranks as one of the competition's best deciders.

programme.title: UEFA Champions League - Stories of the Finals
programme.desc: Revisit the 2011 Champions League final as Barcelona met Manchester United. Barca inflicted another final defeat on Sir Alex Ferguson's men to lift the trophy for the fourth time.

programme.title: UEFA Champions League - Stories of the Finals
programme.desc: We look back at the eventful 2017/18 UEFA Champions League final between five-time winners Liverpool and Real Madrid, who were hoping to lift their third consecutive title in Kiev.

programme.title: The Gruppetto
programme.desc: Rob Hatch presents news from the world of cycling.

programme.desc: Analyst Gary Apple along with special guests review highlights from the previous New York Mets game, as well as giving extended commentary and in-depth insight to the team's overall performance.

programme.title: Oh Yeah ...
programme.desc: A look back at 1995, when head coach Pat Riley sent his resignation letter via fax and left the New York Knicks for the Miami Heat.

programme.desc: Stories in New York sports from 1996.

programme.title: Live: The Carton Show with Craig Carton & Chris McMonigle
programme.desc: Craig Carton & Chris McMonigle take on major sports storylines featuring heated debates and strong, often controversial, opinions.

programme.title: Live: Baseball Night in N.Y.
programme.desc: A cast of leading New York baseball writers and other experts to discuss the latest off-season news involving the Mets, Yankees, and key division rivals.

programme.title: Amazin' Finishes
programme.desc: The most memorable moments from the 2006 season.

programme.title: Live: Mets Pregame
programme.desc: Analyst Gary Apple along with special guests preview the upcoming New York Mets game and series, as well as recapping past performances.

programme.title: Live: MLB Baseball
programme.desc: From American Family Field in Milwaukee.

programme.title: College Football
programme.desc: The No. 9 Fighting Irish end their regular season by visiting the Cardinal. Notre Dame has won nine straight games, against teams with a combined 45-53 record entering Week 14, after scoring its most points since 1932 in a 70-7 win over Syracuse.

programme.title: College Football
programme.desc: The Seminoles put 2024 in the rearview during this opener against the No. 8 Crimson Tide. Florida State went a forgettable 2-10 last year. Alabama turns to Ty Simpson at quarterback after Jalen Milroe was drafted by the NFL's Seattle Seahawks.

programme.title: College Football
programme.desc: The No. 21 Crimson Tide limp home to face the Warhawks. Alabama had its streak of season-opening victories stopped at 23 games with a 31-17 setback at Florida State. Germie Bernard (ALA) registered a career-high 146 receiving yards in that contest.

programme.title: College Football
programme.desc: The No. 19 Crimson Tide (1-1) prepare for another test as they host the Badgers (2-0) in Week 3. Alabama got on the board with a 73-0 dismantling of Louisiana Monroe on Sept. 6. Bama rolled to a 42-10 verdict over Wisconsin on Sept. 14, 2024.

programme.title: College Football
programme.desc: The No. 5 Bulldogs (3-0, 1-0 SEC) take on the No. 17 Crimson Tide (2-1, 0-0). Alabama has won both meetings since Georgia claimed the 2021 title over the Tide. Ryan Williams (ALA) posted 177 receiving yards in last year's 41-34 win.

programme.title: College Football
programme.desc: The No. 16 Commodores (5-0, 1-0 SEC) vie for their first win streak against the No. 10 Crimson Tide (3-1, 1-0) since 1956. Vanderbilt snapped a 23-game series slide with a 40-35 victory in 2024. Alabama won at then-No. 5 Georgia 24-21 in Week 5.

programme.title: Live: Unsportsmanlike with Evan, Canty and Michelle
programme.desc: Start the day off right with Chris Canty, Evan Cohen and Michelle Smallmon providing an energizing and informative way to take on the day. Sports, life and laughter are what it's all about.

programme.title: College Football
programme.desc: The No. 14 Tigers (5-0, 1-0 SEC) brace for the No. 8 Crimson Tide (4-1, 2-0). Alabama has won four in a row after prevailing 30-14 over Vanderbilt on Oct. 4, and is 5-0 versus Missouri since 2012. Mizzou is 5-0 for the second time in three years.

programme.title: College Football
programme.desc: The No. 6 Crimson Tide seek a sixth straight win when they host the No. 11 Volunteers. Last season, Tennessee beat Alabama for the second time in its last 18 attempts, as Chris Brazzell II caught the go-ahead TD pass in a 24-17 decision.

programme.title: College Football
programme.desc: The No. 4 Crimson Tide bring a full head of steam into this match with the Gamecocks. Alabama has won six in a row, with the past four victories coming over ranked opponents after a 37-20 verdict against then-No. 11 Tennessee on Oct. 18.

programme.title: College Football
programme.desc: The Tigers (5-3, 2-3 SEC) try to put a tumultuous period behind them as they visit the No. 4 Crimson Tide (7-1, 5-0). LSU dismissed head coach Brian Kelly and athletic director Scott Woodward in the days following a 49-25 loss to Texas A&M.

programme.title: Live Racing
programme.desc: Today's live racing action from Stratford, Redcar and the Curragh.

programme.title: Irish Racing Replay
programme.desc: Another chance to watch today's racing action from the Curragh.

programme.title: Racing Replay
programme.desc: Another chance to watch today's racing action from Stratford and Redcar.

programme.title: Irish Racing Replay

programme.title: Live Racing
programme.desc: Today's live racing action from Ayr, Cartmel, Beverley and Ballinrobe.

programme.title: The Verdict
programme.desc: Angus McNae returns to crunch the numbers on the new flat season.

programme.title: The Hunt for Monster Bass
programme.desc: Chasing rumors of double-digit bass, champion Chris Lane searches secret Alabama waters for monsters.

programme.title: The VanDam Experience
programme.desc: Kevin VanDam shares the boat with longtime B.A.S.S. Trip Weldon on his home waters in Alabama.

programme.title: Catching Bass With Dustin Wilks
programme.desc: Accomplished angler Dustin Wilks fishes various bass fishing locations and teaches how to find and catch more fish. Loaded with fish catches, Catching Bass with Dustin Wilks is a show that is action packed and shows the viewer numerous techniques for catching bass. Dustin's straight forward approach coupled with his whimsical demeanor makes Catching Bass with Dustin Wilks the perfect teaching plat

programme.title: JT Kenney's Florida Bass
programme.desc: JT Kenney heads to one of the greatest fisheries in the U.S. - Headwaters Lake.

programme.title: Major League Fishing's Bass Pro Tour
programme.desc: 2025 Heavy Hitters Qualifying Group A Day 1 from Smith Mountain Lake in Franklin County, VA. Anglers compete to advance as well as $10,000 Big Bass Bonus.

programme.title: The Hunt for Monster Bass
programme.desc: Chasing rumors of double-digit bass, champion Chris Lane searches secret Alabama waters for monsters.

programme.title: The VanDam Experience
programme.desc: Kevin VanDam shares the boat with longtime B.A.S.S. Trip Weldon on his home waters in Alabama.

programme.title: Catching Bass With Dustin Wilks
programme.desc: Accomplished angler Dustin Wilks fishes various bass fishing locations and teaches how to find and catch more fish. Loaded with fish catches, Catching Bass with Dustin Wilks is a show that is action packed and shows the viewer numerous techniques for catching bass. Dustin's straight forward approach coupled with his whimsical demeanor makes Catching Bass with Dustin Wilks the perfect teaching plat

programme.title: JT Kenney's Florida Bass
programme.desc: JT Kenney heads to one of the greatest fisheries in the U.S. - Headwaters Lake.

programme.title: Hooked on Africa Best of
programme.desc: The annual Catfish run in Botswana's Okavango Delta usually captures most avid fisherman's interests, however this incredible waterway holds a plethora of fresh water species, and we were only too happy to hunt them all down!

programme.title: Hooked on Travel
programme.desc: The annual spawning migration is a phenomenon of nature that draws predators from far and wide to feast on the smorgasbord of marine life. Tommo targets the pelagics offshore, while Wes throws the big baits from the beach targeting massive sharks.

programme.title: Reel Africa
programme.desc: Wesley Peens and Sian Pretorius team up to target monster Garrick off the rocks in Port Saint Johns.

programme.title: Inside Angling
programme.desc: We go back in time, where people are friendly and truly still love their neighbor, history is cherished, and Queen Elizabeth reigns supreme. St Helena Island is a true gem dropped into the Atlantic somewhere between Brazil and Africa, join us, as we meet the Atlantic Saints.

programme.title: Wildfly Best of
programme.desc: From the shadow of the mighty Ukhahlamba mountains flows the gin clear waters of the Mooi River. It is KwaZulu-Natal's premier Brown Trout habitat. The WildFly team know these haunts and the action doesn't disappoint.

programme.title: Fifty Places to Fly Fish Before You Die
programme.desc: Conway Bowman lives his dream to fly-fish along Bristol Bay in southern Alaska with Rick Halford, Chris Wood and Dave Yoder.

programme.title: Dr. Bob's Wild Diaries
programme.desc: An old medical school buddy visits Dr Bob to get a taste of Alaskan fishing.

programme.title: Dr. Bob's Wild Diaries
programme.desc: Bob's business suffers a setback when his plane, the Beaver, breaks down on an Alaskan Lake.

programme.title: Hooked on Africa Best of
programme.desc: The annual Catfish run in Botswana's Okavango Delta usually captures most avid fisherman's interests, however this incredible waterway holds a plethora of fresh water species, and we were only too happy to hunt them all down!

programme.title: Hooked on Travel

programme.title: Reel Africa
programme.desc: Wesley Peens and Sian Pretorius team up to target monster Garrick off the rocks in Port Saint Johns.

programme.title: Dr. Bob's Wild Diaries
programme.desc: Bob takes three generations of one family fishing, but the bugs are out in force for the Alaskan summer.

programme.title: Dr. Bob's Wild Diaries
programme.desc: Dr Bob does some Alaska-style team building, taking the lodge staff out salmon fishing.

programme.title: JT Kenney's Florida Bass
programme.desc: Join pro angler JT Kenney as he embarks on an epic journey across Florida, navigating its diverse waters in pursuit of monstrous bass, showcasing the thrill of the chase and the beauty of the Sunshine State's landscapes.

programme.title: Major League Fishing's Bass Pro Tour
programme.desc: Heavy Hitters Qualifying Group B Day 1 from Smith Mountain Lake in Franklin County, VA. Anglers compete to advance as well as $10,000 Big Bass Bonus.

programme.desc: From Progressive Field in Cleveland.

programme.title: American Association of Professional Baseball
programme.desc: Coverage of baseball games from the MLB Partner League.

programme.desc: Professional boxing with team's fighters competing in individual one round contests.

programme.desc: Roberto Durán; Sugar Ray Leonard; Floyd Mayweather; Thomas Hearns; Oscar De La Hoya.

programme.title: TBL Team Boxing League
programme.desc: Professional boxing with team's fighters competing in individual one round contests.

programme.title: Hobby House
programme.desc: This month, late spring is keeping everyone in the shop busy. Chuck and Audrey spend a full day giving back with the Eagles, Phillies and 76ers. Phillies legend Larry Bowa also discusses some baseball cards from his long career.

programme.title: MLB Baseball
programme.desc: From Progressive Field in Cleveland.

programme.title: Best Mattress Topper Ever!
programme.desc: Back Pain? Hip? Sleep well thanks to this cooling topper!

programme.title: Pure Outdoor
programme.desc: Outdoor sports from all over the world, from freestyle ski jumping to airplane aerobatics.

programme.title: Offroad Odyssey
programme.desc: Adrenaline-pumping action, breathtaking scenery, and unforgettable encounter off-road.

programme.title: Charlie Moore Outdoors
programme.desc: Jazz musician Elan Trotman hooks up with America's Mad Fisherman Charlie Moore; Charlie interviews Elan and fishes with Elan on Lake Winnipesaukee; it is Elan's first time freshwater fishing; Charlie interviews Elan.

programme.title: Charlie Moore: No Offense
programme.desc: A trip to Nashville, Tennessee, with a meet and greet with musician and star of America's Got Talent Dave Fenley. Dave talks to Charlie about his career. Charlie and Dave visit Carter's Vintage Guitars. Charlie attends Dave's concert.

programme.title: MLB Baseball
programme.desc: From Progressive Field in Cleveland.

programme.title: The Varsity With John Ourand
programme.desc: John Ourand and a rotating cast of industry insiders take you inside the executive suites and owners boxes where the decisions that shape the entire sports business are made; you'll hear interviews with players, execs and everyone in between.

programme.title: Live: MLB Baseball
programme.desc: The Pittsburgh Pirates and the New York Yankees meet at Yankee Stadium to open a three-game series. Brandon Lowe leads the Pirates in home runs and runs batted in, while Ben Rice leads the Yankees in home runs, batting average and runs batted in.

programme.title: Live: MLB Baseball
programme.desc: The Toronto Blue Jays host the Chicago White Sox at Rogers Centre in Game 3 of a three-game series. Sean Burke is the starting pitcher for the White Sox, while Trey Yesavage takes the mound for the Blue Jays in an American League showdown.

programme.title: The Blue Jays Way
programme.desc: Heartbreak, star power and a franchise-shifting gamble push the Jays toward their championship destiny.

programme.title: Live: MLB Baseball
programme.desc: The Giants and the Mariners conclude their three-game interleague series at T-Mobile Park. The Giants come from a recent four-game series against the Rockies where they defeated them 3-1, while the Mariners enter after an 8-2 road win over Tampa Bay.

programme.title: MLB's Top 100
programme.desc: Counting down the top 100 plays from the past year in the MLB.

programme.title: Live: Blair & Barker
programme.desc: Jeff Blair and Kevin Barker talk all things Blue Jays, and Major League Baseball.

programme.title: Live: The FAN Pregame
programme.desc: Ailish Forfar and Justin Cuthbert discuss the stories that matter most to sports fans.

programme.title: Live: Blue Jays Central
programme.desc: Toronto Blue Jays pregame show hosted by Jamie Campbell.

programme.title: Live: MLB Baseball
programme.desc: The Blue Jays host the Rays in the opening game of a four-game division series in Toronto. Third baseman Kazuma Okamoto leads Toronto in home runs and RBIs, while the Rays counter with batting leader Yandy Diaz. The Rays lead this series 5-1.

programme.desc: From Suncorp Stadium in Milton, Queensland, Australia.

programme.desc: Host Dave Ross, with the latest betting information to get you set for your day.

programme.desc: Coverage of matches played in the Australian Women's National Rugby League.

programme.title: Gotta See It
programme.desc: Must-see moments from the world of sports.

programme.title: Plays of the Month - Countdown
programme.desc: Highlighting the past month's best in daily sports moments.

programme.title: No Gamble, No Future
programme.desc: Eric Persson, Jean-Robert Bellande, Patrik Antonius, Sean Perry, Lynne Ji, Maria Ho, Eli Elezra, Jimmy D'Ambrosio, Dylan DeStefano, Nick Schulman, Krish Menon, David Williams, Alan Keating and Boston Rob Mariano play a variety of stakes.

programme.title: World's Strongest Man
programme.desc: Athletes compete for the title of world's strongest man.

programme.title: MLB Baseball
programme.desc: The Toronto Blue Jays host the Chicago White Sox at Rogers Centre in Game 3 of a three-game series. Sean Burke is the starting pitcher for the White Sox, while Trey Yesavage takes the mound for the Blue Jays in an American League showdown.

programme.title: Blue Jays in 30
programme.desc: From July 19, 2026.

programme.title: Live: NBA Summer League Basketball
programme.desc: From Thomas & Mack Center in Las Vegas.

programme.title: Misplays of the Month
programme.desc: A look at the month's top bloopers.

programme.title: Blue Jays in 30
programme.desc: From July 19, 2026.

programme.title: MLB Plays of the Week
programme.desc: A look at the top plays and moments from the past week in baseball.

programme.title: Live: MLB Baseball
programme.desc: The Pittsburgh Pirates and the New York Yankees meet at Yankee Stadium to open a three-game series. Brandon Lowe leads the Pirates in home runs and runs batted in, while Ben Rice leads the Yankees in home runs, batting average and runs batted in.

programme.title: The Most Wanted List
programme.desc: This isn't a highlight reel—it's the real deal. The Most Wanted List takes you into raw, unpredictable hunts where nothing goes as planned and every opportunity is earned. Misses, miles and moments that matter... this is what chasing the most wanted is all about.

programme.title: Everything Eichler
programme.desc: Fred Eichler takes viewers on thrilling bow and predator hunts, showcasing the complete field-to-table lifestyle alongside family, friends, and clients. As the host, Fred shares the daily trials of ranching, farming, and managing an outfitting business in Colorado. Expect extreme bowhunting and predator action, intertwined with the ups and downs of their authentic field-to-table journey.

programme.title: Our Way of Life
programme.desc: During the herring spawn, Mike continues the long tradition of passing down generational knowledge to Heather, ensuring she can share this knowledge with her community now and in the future.

programme.title: Hunter
programme.desc: HUNTER® is an exciting new series being produced by Hunter Brand Media and hosted by Dave Poteat, that explores the different ways people use their natural hunter element. The first season is rooted in good ole North American big game hunting which is where Host Dave Poteat's roots run the deepest. But as the series grows in the years to come, we will venture out from the comforts of the Whitetail

programme.title: WildFed
programme.desc: Daniel heads out on a South Carolina gator hunt, then learns about an ancient American caffeine crop called Yaupon being rediscovered in Georgia.

programme.title: The Trail
programme.desc: Laramy realizes that game is scarce because of the wolves, and he decides to put some distance between himself and the pack. Time to break down camp and move to a new location.

programme.title: Relentless Pursuit
programme.desc: Tim Wells hosts episode after episode featuring incredible shots on everything from hogs to frogs.

programme.title: Ranch America
programme.desc: River Klass goes behind the scenes at the rodeo called the "Daddy of 'em All.".

programme.title: M2D Camo's Livin' the Dream
programme.desc: Sparky, AKA THE JOKER from Jokers Wild Outdoors, takes friends, family and clients hunting all over the world and on M2D CAMO Properties for wild, exciting adventures.

programme.title: The Given Right
programme.desc: Tyler Weaver & Kenneth Lancaster return to the Brooks Range of Alaska, on a DIY caribou hunt.

programme.title: Jim Shockey's: The Professionals
programme.desc: Hiking and hunting in Nepal.

programme.title: Small Town Hunting
programme.desc: Small Town Hunting is a show inspired by you, the viewer. The lifestyle throughout small towns everywhere has always been the roots of the hunting culture. Cody, Chris and Keith bring it back to the ground level by documenting the lifestyle of hunting in a raw, cinematic style that we call Small Town Hunting. After all, wherever you call home, there is a little small town in all of us.

programme.title: The Fishmonger
programme.desc: Tommy is back on the water, fishing off the coast of South Carolina for the number one seafood in America.

programme.title: The Hunt for Monster Bass
programme.desc: Champion angler Ott DeFoe navigates shallow Tennessee rivers by jet boat, seeking large summer bass.

programme.title: Adrenaline
programme.desc: Early season food sources come into play in two different states as the Illinois and Iowa deer season rolls in.

programme.title: Wardens
programme.desc: Conservation Officers serve warrants to a suspect believed to have taken eighteen deer without licenses.

programme.title: Jim Shockey's Hunting Adventures
programme.desc: Close range bow hunting in Old Mexico.

programme.title: Pigman: The Series
programme.desc: Brian Pigman Quaca is a true-blue original—an unapologetic, high-energy host with a larger-than-life personality that has redefined outdoor television. With an unrelenting passion for the chase, Pigman takes on the world's toughest hunts, using any legal means necessary to put game on the ground. While his reputation was built on hardcore hog hunting, don't be mistaken—his skills extend far beyond

programme.title: MeatEater
programme.desc: Steve travels to Tanzania for his first ever hunt in Africa.

programme.title: Dropped: Project Origin
programme.desc: A look at life behind the lens from the men that make it happen.

programme.title: Whitetail Fix
programme.desc: A team of God-loving individuals, from different walks of life, different backgrounds and different jobs that all share one common bond: The passion and desire to achieve their Whitetail Fix!

programme.title: Winchester & Drury's Natural Born
programme.desc: Experience the ultimate connection between man and nature with Winchester and Drury Outdoors Natural Born! Whether you love fired-up gobblers, monster whitetails, or Western adventure, Natural Born immerses you in the beauty of nature and the raw authenticity of the hunt. We were born for this!

programme.title: Jim Shockey's Hunting Adventures
programme.desc: Close range bow hunting in Old Mexico.

programme.title: Pigman: The Series
programme.desc: Brian Pigman Quaca is a true-blue original—an unapologetic, high-energy host with a larger-than-life personality that has redefined outdoor television. With an unrelenting passion for the chase, Pigman takes on the world's toughest hunts, using any legal means necessary to put game on the ground. While his reputation was built on hardcore hog hunting, don't be mistaken—his skills extend far beyond

programme.title: Crossroads With the Burtons
programme.desc: NASCAR O Reilly Auto Parts Series driver Jeb Burton and his father, NASCAR legend Ward Burton, take viewers beyond the checkered flag in Crossroads with the Burtons, where the excitement of racing meets a lifelong passion for hunting, conservation and the great outdoors.

programme.title: Backwoods Life
programme.desc: For over 20 years Michael Lee and Kevin Knighton have been blessed to bring the Backwoods Life hunting show and outdoor television into the homes of loyal viewers each week. The guys work hard to bring their lives, personalities and experiences to the show while demonstrating what the average person goes through each year trying to fill tags and their freezers.

programme.title: Jim Shockey's Shock Therapy
programme.desc: Jim sits down with Jack Zimmerman to share his inspiring story of resilience, exploring how Jack continues to pursue hunting adventures around the world despite the challenges he faces as a double amputee veteran.

programme.title: Savage Outdoors
programme.desc: Travel along with the Savage Outdoors crew as they travel North America on some of the most intense big game hunting adventures ever caught on film!

programme.title: Backwoods Life
programme.desc: For over 20 years Michael Lee and Kevin Knighton have been blessed to bring the Backwoods Life hunting show and outdoor television into the homes of loyal viewers each week. The guys work hard to bring their lives, personalities and experiences to the show while demonstrating what the average person goes through each year trying to fill tags and their freezers.

programme.title: RNT-V
programme.desc: It's been 10 years since John made the first J. Stephens calls, but his experience with the craft started way before then; from making calls inspired by call makers from the past to the formation of the J. Stephens Owners Group.

programme.title: Ducks Unlimited
programme.desc: DUTV Co-Host Fred Zink joins Kevin VanDam and his boys on the banks of the Neosho River in Kansas in the heart of the Central Flyway for a waterfowl experience that rekindles the values and the good that comes from spending time outdoors.

programme.title: Wardens
programme.desc: Conservation Officers serve warrants to a suspect believed to have taken eighteen deer without licenses.

programme.title: Small Town Hunting
programme.desc: Small Town Hunting is a show inspired by you, the viewer. The lifestyle throughout small towns everywhere has always been the roots of the hunting culture. Cody, Chris and Keith bring it back to the ground level by documenting the lifestyle of hunting in a raw, cinematic style that we call Small Town Hunting. After all, wherever you call home, there is a little small town in all of us.

programme.title: MOJO TV
programme.desc: Terry meets up with Get Ducks' Ramsey Russell for an unreal duck hunting adventure in Argentina.

programme.title: Man Eats Wild
programme.desc: Mario teams up with good friend and precision rifle expert Bernard and heads into the high alpine mountains above New Zealand's rugged West Coast in search of tahr; drawing on his Greek roots, Mario cooks a rustic Kleftiko dish in an earth oven.

programme.title: Hardcore Pursuit
programme.desc: Follow Mike Pelletier and the hearty gang of northern hunters as they chase whitetail deer, mule deer, elk, moose, bear, turkey and whatever else proves to be an exciting challenge all across North America during Season 18 of HARDCORE Pursuit.

programme.title: The Hunter's Quest
programme.desc: Hunter and his good buddy, Casey Richmond from Eberlestock, get dropped by bush plane into the Alaskan wilderness on the Caribou hunt of a lifetime.

programme.title: Trijicon's World of Sports Afield
programme.desc: Hosted by international big game hunter Dave Fulson, Trijicon's World Of Sports Afield takes the viewer around the globe in search of big game adventure. From the rugged Yukon, to the windswept mountains of North America and Asia, to the great game fields of Africa, this series delivers world-class hunting in each episode!

programme.title: Hardcore Pursuit
programme.desc: Follow Mike Pelletier and the hearty gang of northern hunters as they chase whitetail deer, mule deer, elk, moose, bear, turkey and whatever else proves to be an exciting challenge all across North America during Season 18 of HARDCORE Pursuit.

programme.title: Roger Raglin Outdoors
programme.desc: Join host Roger Raglin for one exciting whitetail adventure after another. Roger Raglin Outdoors features all big game but is predominantly whitetail hunting utilizing a variety of hunting methods: bow, rifle and black powder. As a true outdoorsman and an exceptional big game hunter, Roger shares a lifetime of tricks and techniques to help you in your quest for big game.

programme.title: Dirt Trax TV
programme.desc: Dirt Trax TV is the trusted source North American ATV and UTV enthusiasts turn to for Test Ride reviews of today's most popular off-road vehicles. Fans of Dirt Trax TV are also treated to detailed in-shop technical mods and maintenance features along with travel guides showcasing popular off-road destinations.

programme.title: Hollywood Weapons
programme.desc: John McClane (Bruce Willis) finds himself dangling from the side of a building and must shoot through the glass window to break through to safety; reconstructing the scene using the same Beretta 92 handgun and office glass.

programme.title: Gun Stories
programme.desc: Eugene Stoner is one of the United States' most prolific military small arms designers of modern times; but Eugene Stoner wants to create something that he hopes can be revolutionary; a firearm that can be easily reconfigured for different needs, the Stoner 63.

programme.title: The Wild Outdoors
programme.desc: Hunting at the Diamond Springs Ranch in Kansas.

programme.title: The Fishmonger
programme.desc: Tommy Gomes is playing hooky from his day job at Tunaville Market and Grocery to go fishing in the San Diego Bay.

programme.title: Bill Dance Saltwater
programme.desc: It's a light tackle extravaganza for bonefish and white marlin!

programme.title: Ducks Unlimited
programme.desc: Ducks Unlimited Television—America's original and longest running waterfowl series—brings the audience exciting waterfowl hunting action from around North America every season. DU TV is co-produced by Mossy Oak. The series' current stable of on-air personalities include Doug Larsen, Fred Zink, Jim Ronquest, Mike Stewart, Tom Smith and Julia Stallings.

programme.title: The Hunter's Quest
programme.desc: Hunter and his good buddy, Casey Richmond from Eberlestock, get dropped by bush plane into the Alaskan wilderness on the Caribou hunt of a lifetime.

programme.title: Jim Shockey's Hunting Adventures
programme.desc: Bow and muzzleloader hunts in Saskatchewan.

programme.title: Steve's Outdoor Adventures
programme.desc: Steve West hunts with a longtime outfitter, guide, and friend in coastal Alaska for black bear.

programme.title: Dead Meat
programme.desc: Scott gets back together with a few good friends in search of some of the lesser eaten fish in the Sacramento River Delta, common carp; bow fishing with Matt Lachlan and Kevin Phillips from Michael David Winery for common carp.

programme.title: Hunter
programme.desc: HUNTER® is an exciting new series being produced by Hunter Brand Media and hosted by Dave Poteat that explores the different ways people use their natural hunter element. The first season is rooted in good ole North American big game hunting which is where Host, Dave Poteat's roots run the deepest. But as the series grows in the years to come, we will venture out from the comforts of the Whitetail

programme.title: Guns & Ammo TV
programme.desc: Our Editors review the new version of the beloved Colt M-5 Carbine.

programme.title: Gun Stories
programme.desc: Eugene Stoner is one of the United States' most prolific military small arms designers of modern times; but Eugene Stoner wants to create something that he hopes can be revolutionary; a firearm that can be easily reconfigured for different needs, the Stoner 63.

programme.title: The Trail
programme.desc: Snow, what the mountain men called white death, stops Laramy in his tracks; his trusty horse Seven has suffered a leg injury; Laramy must take care of Seven, battle through hunger and survive the snowfall.

programme.title: Roger Raglin Outdoors
programme.desc: Join host Roger Raglin for one exciting whitetail adventure after another. Roger Raglin Outdoors features all big game but is predominantly whitetail hunting utilizing a variety of hunting methods: bow, rifle and black powder. As a true outdoorsman and an exceptional big game hunter, Roger shares a lifetime of tricks and techniques to help you in your quest for big game.

programme.title: Big Deer TV
programme.desc: Big Deer Producer Justin Karnopp returns to his Oregon roots.

programme.title: Bowhunter TV
programme.desc: Curt Wells heads to Alberta for an unforgettable moose hunt. After calling in a bull closer than expected Curt rallies and makes a great shot. Then, the tables turn when after a quick calling lesson from his guide, Curt calls in another bull moose.

programme.title: Winchester & Drury's Natural Born
programme.desc: Experience the ultimate connection between man and nature with Winchester and Drury Outdoors Natural Born! Whether you love fired-up gobblers, monster whitetails, or Western adventure, Natural Born immerses you in the beauty of nature and the raw authenticity of the hunt. We were born for this!

programme.title: Dead Meat
programme.desc: Scott gets back together with a few good friends in search of some of the lesser eaten fish in the Sacramento River Delta, common carp; bow fishing with Matt Lachlan and Kevin Phillips from Michael David Winery for common carp.

programme.title: MeatEater
programme.desc: Steve travels to Tanzania for his first ever hunt in Africa.

programme.title: MeatEater
programme.desc: Actor and comedian Joe Rogan joins Steve on a bowhunting expedition to the Great Basin of Nevada for skittish quarry: the high desert mule deer.

programme.title: Winchester Deadly Passion
programme.desc: Hunting spot-and-stalk mule deer and antelope in Colorado is one of the best ways to kick off the season!

programme.title: Hoge Wild
programme.desc: Hoge Wild is an exhilarating adventure TV series that follows the charismatic country music artist and host, Lucas Hoge, as he embarks on thrilling escapades around the world. With a passion for music, hunting, fishing, and scuba diving, Lucas Hoge brings a unique blend of talents to the screen. Viewers are taken on a wild ride as Lucas explores diverse landscapes, from rugged mountains to crystal

programme.title: The Hunter's Quest
programme.desc: Hunter and his good buddy, Casey Richmond from Eberlestock, get dropped by bush plane into the Alaskan wilderness on the Caribou hunt of a lifetime.

programme.title: Live The Open: Final Round
programme.desc: The final round of the 154th Open Championship, staged at Royal Birkdale.

programme.title: Live World Matchplay Darts D2 S2
programme.desc: The second session of day two at the 2026 Betfred World Matchplay at the iconic Winter Gardens in Blackpool, where 32 of the world's best compete for the coveted Phil Taylor Trophy.

programme.title: World Cup Report
programme.desc: A comprehensive round-up of all the day's World Cup news.

programme.title: World Cup Breakfast
programme.desc: A round-up of the all the breaking news stories from the 2026 FIFA World Cup, with live analysis and comment plus interviews with the headline makers.

programme.title: World Cup Report
programme.desc: A comprehensive round-up of all the day's World Cup news.

programme.title: Live World Matchplay Darts D3
programme.desc: Day three of the 2026 Betfred World Matchplay at the iconic Winter Gardens in Blackpool, where 32 of the world's best compete for the coveted Phil Taylor Trophy.

programme.title: World Cup Report
programme.desc: A comprehensive round-up of all the day's World Cup news.
